# Canberra Vasectomy

> Dr John Deery's vasectomy practice in Canberra, Australia. Specialising in no-scalpel vasectomy with over 7,000 procedures performed.

## Website Information

- URL: https://canberravasectomy.com.au
- Practice: Canberra Vasectomy — Dr John Deery
- Phone: (02) 6103 0434
- Booking System: HotDoc (online appointment booking)

## Locations

### YourGP@Crace
- Address: 1/5 Baratta Street, Crace ACT 2911
- Schedule: Thursday 1:30pm–2:30pm (consultations and procedures), Friday (procedures)

### YourGP@Lyneham
- Address: 62 Brigalow Street, Lyneham ACT 2602
- Schedule: Wednesday 3pm–5pm

### YourGP@Denman
- Address: Level 1, 1B Felstead Vista, Denman Prospect ACT 2611
- Schedule: Monday 3pm–5pm

## Pages

### Home
- Path: /
- Description: Landing page with practice overview, embedded educational videos, doctor credentials, clinic locations, fees summary, and booking call-to-action.

### Bookings
- Path: /bookings
- Description: Online booking links for each location via HotDoc. Phone booking option. Embedded Google Maps for all three clinic locations with addresses and session times.

### FAQ
- Path: /faq
- Description: 34 frequently asked questions organised in 6 sections — The Basics, The Procedure, Recovery, Risks & Effects, Other Considerations, and Advanced Considerations. Covers effectiveness, pain, recovery time, risks, sperm banking, AI scribes, and reversals.

### Pre-Operation Instructions
- Path: /pre-operation-instructions
- Description: 7-point preparation checklist for patients before vasectomy. Includes shaving instructions, medication guidance (avoid aspirin), hygiene, supportive underwear, and pain relief options.

### Post-Operation Instructions
- Path: /post-operation-instructions
- Description: Comprehensive aftercare guide covering what to expect immediately after, pain management, wound care, activity restrictions, sexual activity timeline, follow-up semen analysis at 3 months, potential complications, and when to seek emergency care.

### About John
- Path: /john
- Description: Dr John Deery's profile — graduated UNSW 2000, married to Dr Mel Deery, 3 children, 750+ vasectomies per year, 20+ years experience, former NRL player (Roosters and Dragons). Work schedule across all three clinics.

### New Patient
- Path: /new-patient
- Description: 3-step preparation guide for new patients — complete new patient form (HotDoc), sign consent form, and watch consent video (embedded Vimeo).

### Regional NSW
- Path: /regional-nsw
- Description: Information for patients from regional NSW (Parkes, Wagga, Bega and beyond). Telehealth consultation options and single-visit procedure availability. 50–100 procedures per year from regional NSW patients.

### Privacy Policy
- Path: /privacy-policy
- Description: YourGP privacy policy covering collection, use, storage, and protection of personal and health information. Reviewed February 2026. PDF version available for download.

## Key Facts

- Procedure Type: No-scalpel vasectomy under local anaesthetic
- Experience: Over 7,000 procedures performed, 90% of ACT vasectomies
- Rate: 750+ vasectomies per year
- Aftercare: 3 months included aftercare with semen analysis
- Sedation: Available on request
- Recovery: Patients can drive themselves home
- Telehealth: Available for regional NSW consultations
